column1: # Out-of-domain rejection cases (eval/evalkit RunOOD, `pixkb eval ood`).
# One query per line — no expected-id column (nothing should confidently
# match). Gate: none of eval/cases-precise-ids.tsv's or
# eval/cases-fuzzy-ids.tsv's expected ids may appear in the result (see
# ForbiddenIDs / ForbiddenPresent). Verified live on 2026-07-04 at limit=5:
# 3 of 4 return only web/acessoinformacao-*.md institutional filler (clean).
# "receita de bolo de cenoura" leaks 2 normative reference ids
# documented baseline (`pixkb eval ood` reports cases=4 clean=3 leaked=1
# today), not a bug in this harness. A future regression widening the leak
# (more leaked ids, or a leak on a previously-clean case) is real signal;
# fixing this one is backlogged (see docs/BACKLOG.md) since it needs ranking
# work, not eval-tooling work, and ADR 0002 forbids re-tuning ranking here.
qual a previsão do tempo para amanhã em São Paulo?
melhor time de futebol do brasil
qual o número de telefone do presidente do Banco Central?
